biological_replicate: For each replicate, iridocorneal angles from three individual mice were pooled
experimental_design: To investigate alterations in gene expression within the iridocorneal region of DBA/2J mice relative to Gpnmb+ controls
factor_value: DBA/2J and Gpnmb+ mice were acquired from The Jackson Laboratory
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: three biological replicates for the DBA/2J group and two replicates for the Gpnmb+ group
number_of_samples: three biological replicates for the DBA/2J group and two replicates for the Gpnmb+ group
